---
title: "Machine Learning Systems"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    title-block: none
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

```{=html}
<div id="mls-neural-bg" aria-hidden="true"></div>
<div class="mls-landing">

<!-- Section 1: Textbook -->
<section class="mls-section">
<div class="mls-landing-grid">
  <div class="mls-landing-left">
    <p class="mls-hero-eyebrow">TWO-VOLUME TEXTBOOK</p>
    <h1 class="mls-hero-title">Machine Learning<br/>Systems.</h1>
    <p class="mls-hero-tagline">Two volumes. One curriculum.<br/>The physics of AI engineering.</p>
    <p class="mls-hero-intro">A rigorous, principles-first treatment of how ML systems<br/>are built, optimized, and deployed—from a single<br/>machine to fleet-scale infrastructure.</p>

    <div class="mls-meta">
      <p class="mls-links"><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/tinytorch/">TinyTorch</a> · <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/mlsysim/">MLSys·im</a> · <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/labs/">Labs</a> · <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/kits/">Hardware Kits</a> · <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/slides/">Slides</a></p>
      <p class="mls-links"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a> · <a href="https://opencollective.com/mlsysbook" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open Collective</a></p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="mls-landing-right">
    <div class="mls-volumes">
      <div class="mls-vol-card">
        <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/" class="mls-vol-card-link" title="Open Volume I">
          <span class="mls-vol-cover-wrap"><img src="covers/cover-hardcover-book-vol1.png" alt="Volume I cover" class="mls-vol-cover" loading="lazy" /></span>
          <p class="mls-vol-title">Volume I</p>
          <p class="mls-vol-subtitle">Introduction to Machine Learning Systems</p>
        </a>
        <p class="mls-vol-downloads">
          <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">HTML</a>
          <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/assets/downloads/Machine-Learning-Systems-Vol1.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">PDF</a>
          <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/assets/downloads/Machine-Learning-Systems-Vol1.epub" target="_blank" rel="noopener">EPUB</a>
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="mls-vol-card">
        <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol2/" class="mls-vol-card-link" title="Open Volume II">
          <span class="mls-vol-cover-wrap"><img src="covers/cover-hardcover-book-vol2.png" alt="Volume II cover" class="mls-vol-cover" loading="lazy" /></span>
          <p class="mls-vol-title">Volume II</p>
          <p class="mls-vol-subtitle">Machine Learning Systems at Scale</p>
        </a>
        <p class="mls-vol-downloads">
          <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol2/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">HTML</a>
          <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol2/assets/downloads/Machine-Learning-Systems-Vol2.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">PDF</a>
          <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol2/assets/downloads/Machine-Learning-Systems-Vol2.epub" target="_blank" rel="noopener">EPUB</a>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="mls-scroll-indicator">
  <span>Scroll to Explore</span>
  <div class="mls-scroll-arrow">&darr;</div>
</div>
</section>

<!-- Section 2: TinyTorch (BUILD) -->
<section class="mls-section">
<div class="mls-landing-grid">
  <div class="mls-landing-left">
    <p class="mls-hero-eyebrow">TINYTORCH</p>
    <h1 class="mls-hero-title">Build it.<br/>From scratch.</h1>
    <p class="mls-hero-tagline">20 interactive modules.<br/>Zero magic.</p>
    <p class="mls-hero-intro">Understand the inner workings of modern ML frameworks by building your own tensor library, automatic differentiation engine, and neural network modules in Python.</p>

    <div class="mls-meta">
      <p class="mls-links"><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/tinytorch/">Start Building &rarr;</a></p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="mls-landing-right">
    <div class="mls-feature-card">
      <div class="css-terminal-wrapper">
        <div class="css-terminal">
          <div class="css-terminal-header">
            <span class="term-dot close"></span>
            <span class="term-dot min"></span>
            <span class="term-dot max"></span>
          </div>
          <div class="css-terminal-body">
            <div class="term-line"><span class="term-kw">class</span> <span class="term-def">Tensor</span>:</div>
            <div class="term-line" style="padding-left: 15px;"><span class="term-kw">def</span> <span class="term-def">__init__</span>(self, data):</div>
            <div class="term-line" style="padding-left: 30px;">self.data = data</div>
            <div class="term-line" style="padding-left: 30px;">self.grad = <span class="term-num">0.0</span></div>
            <div class="term-line" style="padding-left: 30px;">self._backward = <span class="term-kw">lambda</span>: <span class="term-kw">None</span></div>
            <div class="term-line"><span class="term-cursor"></span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="term-shadow"></div>
      </div>
      <p class="mls-feature-desc">A pedagogical framework for learning ML systems engineering.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</section>

<!-- Section 3: MLSysim (MODEL) -->
<section class="mls-section">
<div class="mls-landing-grid">
  <div class="mls-landing-left">
    <p class="mls-hero-eyebrow">MLSYS·IM</p>
    <h1 class="mls-hero-title">Model the<br/>trade-offs.</h1>
    <p class="mls-hero-tagline">One command.<br/>Every bottleneck.</p>
    <p class="mls-hero-intro">A first-principles modeling engine for reasoning about ML system performance. Evaluate training, serving, and distributed configurations before committing hardware or code.</p>

    <div class="mls-meta">
      <p class="mls-links"><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/mlsysim/">Explore MLSys·im &rarr;</a></p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="mls-landing-right">
    <div class="mls-feature-card">
      <div class="sim-panel">
        <!-- CLI command line — cycles through 3 batch sizes -->
        <div class="sim-cli">
          <span class="sim-cli-prompt">$</span>
          <span class="sim-cli-cmd">mlsysim</span> <span class="sim-cli-arg">eval</span> <span class="sim-cli-model">llama-3-70b</span> <span class="sim-cli-flag">--hw</span> <span class="sim-cli-val">h100</span> <span class="sim-cli-flag">--batch</span> <span class="sim-swap"><span class="sim-tri-a sim-cli-batch-val">1</span><span class="sim-tri-b sim-cli-batch-val">32</span><span class="sim-tri-c sim-cli-batch-val">128</span></span>
        </div>
        <!-- Roofline: dot visits 3 positions -->
        <div class="sim-roofline-top">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 260 105" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sim-roofline-svg">
            <!-- axes -->
            <line x1="30" y1="88" x2="248" y2="88" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)" stroke-width="0.8"/>
            <line x1="30" y1="88" x2="30" y2="8" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)" stroke-width="0.8"/>
            <!-- roofline curve -->
            <polyline points="30,78 120,22 248,22" fill="none" stroke="#4a90c4" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
            <!-- ridge point line + label -->
            <line x1="120" y1="22" x2="120" y2="88" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
            <text x="120" y="96" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.25)" font-size="5.5" font-family="inherit" text-anchor="middle">ridge point</text>
            <!-- Workload dot — 3 stops: mem-bound → ridge → compute-bound -->
            <circle r="5.5" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.6)" stroke-width="1.5">
              <animate attributeName="cx" values="70;70;120;120;200;200;70" keyTimes="0;0.28;0.33;0.61;0.66;0.95;1" dur="9s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
              <animate attributeName="cy" values="55;55;22;22;22;22;55" keyTimes="0;0.28;0.33;0.61;0.66;0.95;1" dur="9s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
              <animate attributeName="fill" values="#c87b2a;#c87b2a;#3d9e5a;#3d9e5a;#e05252;#e05252;#c87b2a" keyTimes="0;0.28;0.33;0.61;0.66;0.95;1" dur="9s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
            </circle>
            <!-- Labels at each position (fade in/out with scenario) -->
            <text class="sim-tri-a" x="78" y="49" fill="#c87b2a" font-size="7.5" font-weight="600" font-family="inherit">b=1</text>
            <text class="sim-tri-b" x="128" y="16" fill="#3d9e5a" font-size="7.5" font-weight="600" font-family="inherit">b=32</text>
            <text class="sim-tri-c" x="208" y="16" fill="#e05252" font-size="7.5" font-weight="600" font-family="inherit">b=128</text>
            <!-- Region labels -->
            <text x="43" y="70" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.25)" font-size="6.5" font-family="inherit">mem-bound</text>
            <text x="170" y="40" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.25)" font-size="6.5" font-family="inherit">compute-bound</text>
            <!-- Axis labels -->
            <text x="140" y="88" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" font-size="6" font-family="inherit">Arithmetic Intensity</text>
            <text x="12" y="48" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" font-size="6" font-family="inherit" transform="rotate(-90,12,48)">FLOP/s</text>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <!-- Config output — batch value cycles -->
        <div class="sim-output">
          <div class="sim-output-grid">
            <span class="sim-output-key">Model</span><span class="sim-output-val">Llama-3-70B</span>
            <span class="sim-output-key">HW</span><span class="sim-output-val">H100 (80 GB)</span>
            <span class="sim-output-key">Batch</span><span class="sim-output-val sim-swap"><span class="sim-tri-a">1</span><span class="sim-tri-b">32</span><span class="sim-tri-c">128</span></span>
            <span class="sim-output-key">Precision</span><span class="sim-output-val">BF16</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Bottleneck indicator — 3-way overlay -->
        <div class="sim-overlay-row">
          <span class="sim-bottleneck-chip sim-tri-a sim-bn-amber"><span class="sim-bn-icon mem"></span>Memory-bound</span>
          <span class="sim-bottleneck-chip sim-tri-b sim-bn-green"><span class="sim-bn-icon ridge"></span>At ridge point</span>
          <span class="sim-bottleneck-chip sim-tri-c sim-bn-red"><span class="sim-bn-icon compute"></span>Compute-bound</span>
        </div>
        <!-- Result chips — 3 scenario sets -->
        <div class="sim-overlay-row sim-chips-row">
          <div class="sim-result-set sim-tri-a">
            <span class="sim-result-chip sim-chip-red">MFU 12%</span>
            <span class="sim-result-chip sim-chip-amber">HBM 54%</span>
            <span class="sim-result-chip sim-chip-green">TTFT 28 ms</span>
          </div>
          <div class="sim-result-set sim-tri-b">
            <span class="sim-result-chip sim-chip-green">MFU 62%</span>
            <span class="sim-result-chip sim-chip-green">HBM 81%</span>
            <span class="sim-result-chip sim-chip-green">TTFT 112 ms</span>
          </div>
          <div class="sim-result-set sim-tri-c">
            <span class="sim-result-chip sim-chip-green">MFU 71%</span>
            <span class="sim-result-chip sim-chip-red">HBM 97%</span>
            <span class="sim-result-chip sim-chip-red">TTFT 840 ms</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p class="mls-feature-desc">Change one parameter. Watch every bottleneck shift.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</section>

<!-- Section 4: Labs (EXPLORE) -->
<section class="mls-section">
<div class="mls-landing-grid">
  <div class="mls-landing-left">
    <p class="mls-hero-eyebrow">INTERACTIVE LABS</p>
    <h1 class="mls-hero-title">Learn by<br/>doing.</h1>
    <p class="mls-hero-tagline">Marimo notebooks.<br/>Coming Summer 2026.</p>
    <p class="mls-hero-intro">Interactive labs that reveal the hidden costs of ML systems. Explore sustainability, performance trade-offs, and hardware constraints through hands-on simulation.</p>

    <div class="mls-meta">
      <p class="mls-links"><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/labs/">View Labs &rarr;</a></p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="mls-landing-right">
    <div class="mls-feature-card">
      <div class="lab-card">
        <div class="lab-header"><span>Lab 15 &middot; Sustainable AI</span><span class="lab-badge">Explore</span></div>
        <div class="lab-body">
          <div class="lab-question">Same 1,000 GPU-hours. Pick your datacenter.</div>
          <div class="lab-map-wrap">
            <svg class="lab-map-svg" viewBox="0 0 300 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
              <rect width="300" height="150" fill="#eef2f7" rx="4"/>
              <path d="M0.0,17.5L8.4,20.0L5.9,21.5L0.1,20.1L300.0,20.9L297.8,21.2L299.4,23.1L286.3,25.1L285.1,29.3L280.7,32.5L279.9,27.7L287.1,22.9L283.4,24.5L280.6,23.8L279.2,25.7L268.5,25.8L262.6,29.4L266.6,29.8L267.8,31.5L264.1,37.4L256.3,41.9L257.6,45.8L255.4,46.3L254.4,42.0L250.9,42.6L251.4,40.9L248.4,42.3L249.1,43.8L252.0,43.8L249.3,45.9L251.6,48.6L251.4,51.5L246.6,56.0L238.2,58.5L241.1,63.8L238.7,67.1L237.6,67.8L233.4,63.8L232.7,67.3L236.9,73.9L232.0,68.5L231.0,60.9L228.5,61.6L226.2,56.0L222.5,57.1L216.9,61.8L216.5,66.4L214.6,68.4L210.5,57.2L208.7,57.6L205.3,53.8L197.8,53.6L190.0,50.0L193.2,55.0L197.0,53.0L199.8,56.4L195.7,60.9L186.2,64.5L179.1,50.4L178.3,52.0L177.0,50.1L181.2,59.5L185.6,65.2L187.2,66.3L192.6,65.0L192.5,66.1L190.5,70.6L182.7,78.9L184.0,87.2L179.0,91.5L179.7,94.8L177.1,96.4L177.1,98.6L172.9,102.7L166.3,104.0L159.8,90.1L161.4,83.9L157.3,75.9L158.2,72.4L153.6,69.8L142.5,71.0L136.1,64.7L135.8,57.1L145.1,45.2L157.9,43.9L159.3,44.2L158.6,46.8L165.9,49.8L168.0,47.6L178.1,49.2L180.1,44.5L173.0,44.5L171.8,42.1L177.9,40.0L184.8,40.0L180.6,37.3L182.6,35.6L178.2,38.0L175.6,36.2L173.1,39.5L174.0,40.8L169.0,41.3L170.0,43.6L168.7,44.7L166.3,40.2L161.0,36.9L160.5,38.3L165.4,41.5L164.1,41.3L163.4,43.3L157.4,38.0L152.6,39.1L148.2,44.4L142.6,44.3L142.2,39.1L148.8,38.3L149.0,36.7L146.2,34.4L156.8,30.4L157.1,27.4L158.8,26.9L159.1,30.0L166.4,29.6L168.0,27.2L170.1,27.5L169.5,25.7L174.3,25.0L167.8,24.4L167.9,22.3L171.2,20.7L168.5,20.2L164.9,22.7L165.7,24.9L163.2,28.2L160.8,28.9L158.6,25.4L154.7,26.2L154.9,22.8L170.5,15.8L184.2,18.8L177.7,19.5L180.8,21.8L186.6,19.9L186.2,17.9L188.5,18.1L188.6,19.4L194.8,17.6L200.0,18.1L200.5,16.8L207.1,18.3L205.6,15.8L208.3,14.1L210.7,14.8L211.4,18.0L209.4,19.7L210.4,19.9L212.5,18.5L210.9,15.5L212.2,14.3L212.7,15.6L217.9,15.2L217.1,13.6L237.0,10.3L245.1,11.8L241.2,13.2L255.8,13.7L259.4,16.0L267.1,14.3L291.3,17.8L292.0,16.6L298.8,17.2L0.0,17.5Z M74.5,17.1L77.2,19.0L78.7,16.8L81.1,17.0L82.3,18.7L72.4,23.3L71.1,25.9L73.1,27.4L81.4,29.0L83.4,32.3L84.5,31.2L83.5,29.4L86.2,27.9L84.6,26.0L84.9,23.1L88.5,23.0L92.0,24.1L93.6,26.5L96.2,24.7L103.6,31.5L94.7,33.1L90.7,36.0L95.8,34.0L96.3,36.5L100.2,36.7L95.5,38.7L96.3,37.3L94.1,37.4L91.1,39.1L91.7,40.3L87.1,42.1L86.7,44.0L86.4,42.4L86.9,45.4L82.2,48.8L83.0,54.0L79.9,49.9L71.8,50.2L69.0,51.8L68.4,56.3L69.8,58.9L72.7,59.6L77.5,57.0L75.9,61.8L80.7,62.5L80.1,65.5L81.5,67.5L86.0,67.8L90.2,64.6L90.3,67.4L91.7,64.9L93.2,66.2L98.4,66.1L102.4,70.0L107.2,71.5L108.0,75.1L116.7,77.4L121.1,81.1L117.5,86.5L115.9,93.3L110.3,95.7L105.2,103.7L101.3,103.3L102.7,105.3L101.9,106.8L95.7,109.2L97.1,110.5L93.9,113.0L95.0,115.1L90.8,119.9L87.5,118.6L88.2,114.1L87.0,113.9L89.4,110.3L88.1,111.0L91.4,90.3L86.7,87.2L82.3,80.1L82.6,75.9L85.7,71.8L84.5,67.7L82.6,69.0L78.6,66.7L77.1,63.9L63.8,59.8L54.4,48.5L58.8,55.7L56.5,54.4L46.3,41.4L46.1,34.8L47.8,35.8L47.6,34.2L43.8,32.6L38.3,26.6L27.4,24.3L23.6,25.7L24.5,23.9L18.0,28.3L12.7,29.7L19.1,25.9L15.0,26.1L11.6,23.8L16.0,21.0L9.9,20.3L15.3,19.9L11.0,18.0L19.5,15.5L36.2,17.6L46.3,16.5L59.3,18.8L61.5,17.7L69.9,18.9L71.5,17.4L69.6,16.6L70.7,15.1L74.5,17.1Z M0.0,145.6L30.7,145.9L22.0,144.7L22.6,143.4L19.3,142.6L28.0,141.9L20.6,140.9L18.0,139.1L23.9,139.5L28.2,137.8L55.0,136.4L66.1,137.8L63.6,135.5L93.4,135.7L93.5,131.1L101.8,127.7L95.3,131.6L98.5,133.9L98.9,136.8L85.6,138.9L88.6,139.9L85.0,141.0L101.5,144.3L126.2,141.9L120.2,140.3L135.4,137.6L144.3,134.1L172.6,133.7L178.2,132.1L182.2,133.1L195.4,129.8L207.4,131.6L206.6,134.9L208.2,135.2L223.3,130.2L229.8,131.2L235.7,129.6L238.5,130.8L244.7,129.9L249.9,131.1L262.6,129.4L264.6,130.8L292.7,134.7L286.3,138.5L289.2,140.6L283.2,142.5L298.6,145.4L0.0,145.6Z M269.6,86.5L277.6,96.7L277.6,100.8L275.0,106.2L271.9,107.5L267.2,106.7L265.2,103.7L264.0,104.4L264.8,102.4L263.3,104.1L259.4,101.2L248.4,104.2L245.9,103.5L245.1,93.1L250.7,91.4L255.1,86.7L258.0,87.5L259.9,84.4L263.7,84.9L262.9,87.5L266.8,89.8L268.8,83.9L269.6,86.5Z M127.4,5.4L132.6,6.1L123.4,6.5L139.8,7.3L133.3,8.2L135.2,8.2L133.6,9.4L134.6,10.8L131.9,11.1L133.9,13.1L129.3,14.7L131.9,16.1L128.0,16.5L131.4,16.6L116.8,20.5L113.9,24.9L109.8,24.3L107.0,22.0L105.0,19.0L107.6,16.7L104.4,17.0L107.2,16.2L103.5,15.3L104.4,14.5L101.2,12.1L88.9,10.0L99.8,6.6L127.4,5.4Z M0.0,88.8L299.5,89.0L0.0,88.8Z M77.9,14.0L89.8,15.4L98.5,19.3L96.7,20.8L93.3,19.8L96.1,22.2L92.7,21.9L94.9,23.4L85.2,21.5L89.5,18.9L84.2,16.5L75.1,15.6L75.5,14.1L77.9,14.0Z M92.9,5.7L98.5,6.1L85.9,8.9L87.2,9.6L82.9,11.5L75.4,11.3L79.2,10.4L76.7,9.7L79.1,8.9L77.6,8.1L81.8,7.9L73.7,6.8L92.9,5.7Z M261.8,76.0L262.9,77.8L265.3,76.4L270.5,78.2L275.6,83.8L270.6,81.4L268.9,82.8L264.7,82.0L264.9,79.5L260.8,78.4L260.0,77.4L261.4,76.8L258.8,75.8L261.8,76.0Z M248.2,73.5L249.2,74.2L246.8,78.3L241.9,77.4L240.9,75.4L241.4,73.3L247.3,69.2L249.3,70.5L248.2,73.5Z M54.9,14.1L59.8,15.3L61.2,14.1L65.9,16.6L55.6,17.9L52.2,16.7L56.3,16.4L50.5,15.4L54.9,14.1Z M191.7,86.3L189.2,95.8L186.7,95.8L187.0,88.5L191.0,85.0L191.7,86.3Z M0.0,15.4L300.0,16.0L0.0,15.4Z M190.9,40.6L192.0,41.5L191.0,43.7L194.9,44.2L193.9,41.6L195.6,40.9L191.9,38.1L194.2,36.0L188.9,37.8L190.9,40.6Z M238.2,79.9L235.5,78.5L229.4,70.4L236.5,74.9L238.2,79.9Z M147.5,26.1L147.4,28.4L151.2,32.3L145.6,33.4L147.5,30.0L144.9,27.7L147.5,26.1Z M267.5,44.0L266.9,45.7L263.2,47.1L259.2,46.8L258.9,49.1L257.8,47.3L263.1,45.4L267.8,40.5L267.5,44.0Z M197.9,16.1L192.9,15.0L196.4,12.4L207.4,11.2L198.7,13.1L196.2,14.7L197.9,16.1Z M112.4,140.0L113.9,141.7L104.9,142.2L112.4,140.0Z M137.9,19.6L138.7,20.7L134.5,22.1L129.7,20.3L137.9,19.6Z M49.6,15.5L45.1,15.1L45.9,13.1L53.7,13.8L49.6,15.5Z M77.5,8.6L78.5,8.9L74.3,9.8L69.4,8.2L73.0,7.3L77.5,8.6Z M71.1,10.8L83.5,12.6L75.2,12.9L69.1,11.0L71.1,10.8Z M165.2,8.6L168.0,9.2L163.3,11.0L158.7,8.6L165.2,8.6Z M294.2,109.1L295.2,109.8L292.2,113.3L288.9,113.5L294.2,109.1Z M103.2,32.8L105.8,34.4L105.8,36.1L100.6,35.3L103.2,32.8Z M254.4,73.8L250.2,74.8L250.8,76.2L252.8,75.5L251.3,76.6L252.6,79.5L250.8,77.2L249.5,79.5L250.0,74.5L254.4,73.8Z M59.8,11.5L61.9,12.1L51.9,12.3L59.8,11.5Z M233.3,9.3L226.0,8.0L229.9,7.3L233.3,9.3Z M93.0,134.1L87.5,135.1L90.7,132.5L93.0,134.1Z M295.5,105.1L298.8,106.4L296.0,109.7L293.9,103.8L295.5,105.1Z M93.5,119.9L95.8,120.6L90.8,120.9L87.8,119.0L93.5,119.9Z M240.5,80.6L246.4,82.0L237.8,80.7L240.5,80.6Z M269.7,32.7L270.5,34.2L269.3,33.9L269.6,36.6L268.4,36.7L268.5,29.8L269.7,32.7Z M269.9,38.2L271.3,38.9L266.6,40.4L268.3,37.0L269.9,38.2Z M83.6,56.0L88.2,58.1L85.2,58.5L81.8,56.1L79.2,56.8L83.6,56.0Z M251.1,59.6L251.4,63.1L253.4,64.6L249.9,62.2L251.1,59.6Z M66.4,13.5L68.9,13.5L69.4,15.3L64.6,14.6L66.4,13.5Z M144.3,31.4L141.7,31.8L141.9,30.1L144.4,29.0L144.3,31.4Z M270.9,12.0L264.1,12.3L270.9,12.0Z M79.0,20.3L83.2,21.9L77.3,22.0L79.0,20.3Z M255.3,68.0L254.5,70.3L253.0,68.5L251.6,69.0L254.5,66.9L255.3,68.0Z M171.2,8.0L172.8,8.3L164.5,8.1L171.2,8.0Z M72.3,14.4L70.0,13.8L74.6,13.5L72.3,14.4Z M271.2,109.0L273.6,109.1L273.3,111.0L271.7,111.3L271.2,109.0Z M89.5,58.4L93.1,59.5L88.0,59.7L89.5,58.4Z M53.2,10.3L47.6,11.6L53.2,10.3Z M67.9,11.1L68.2,12.5L64.6,12.0L67.9,11.1Z M217.7,69.8L216.8,66.8L217.7,69.8Z M237.6,9.7L232.9,10.1L235.1,8.9L237.6,9.7Z" class="lab-map-land"/>
              <!-- All 6 datacenter dots (static, small) -->
              <circle cx="158" cy="23" r="2" fill="#64748b" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/><!-- Norway -->
              <circle cx="152" cy="34" r="2" fill="#64748b" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/><!-- France -->
              <circle cx="236" cy="74" r="2" fill="#64748b" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/><!-- Singapore -->
              <circle cx="72" cy="40" r="2" fill="#64748b" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/><!-- US -->
              <circle cx="211" cy="59" r="2" fill="#64748b" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/><!-- India -->
              <circle cx="167" cy="32" r="2" fill="#64748b" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/><!-- Poland -->
              <!-- Active glow — large pulsing halo -->
              <circle r="12" opacity="0.2" stroke="none">
                <animate attributeName="cx" values="158;158;152;152;236;236;72;72;211;211;167;167;158" keyTimes="0;0.14;0.167;0.31;0.333;0.48;0.5;0.64;0.667;0.81;0.833;0.97;1" dur="15s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                <animate attributeName="cy" values="23;23;34;34;74;74;40;40;59;59;32;32;23" keyTimes="0;0.14;0.167;0.31;0.333;0.48;0.5;0.64;0.667;0.81;0.833;0.97;1" dur="15s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                <animate attributeName="fill" values="#2d8a4e;#2d8a4e;#3d9e5a;#3d9e5a;#d4a017;#d4a017;#c87b2a;#c87b2a;#c44;#c44;#e05252;#e05252;#2d8a4e" keyTimes="0;0.14;0.167;0.31;0.333;0.48;0.5;0.64;0.667;0.81;0.833;0.97;1" dur="15s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                <animate attributeName="r" values="10;16;10" dur="1.2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.3;0.1;0.3" dur="1.2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
              </circle>
              <!-- Active ring — expanding outline pulse -->
              <circle fill="none" stroke-width="2" r="5" opacity="0">
                <animate attributeName="cx" values="158;158;152;152;236;236;72;72;211;211;167;167;158" keyTimes="0;0.14;0.167;0.31;0.333;0.48;0.5;0.64;0.667;0.81;0.833;0.97;1" dur="15s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                <animate attributeName="cy" values="23;23;34;34;74;74;40;40;59;59;32;32;23" keyTimes="0;0.14;0.167;0.31;0.333;0.48;0.5;0.64;0.667;0.81;0.833;0.97;1" dur="15s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                <animate attributeName="stroke" values="#2d8a4e;#2d8a4e;#3d9e5a;#3d9e5a;#d4a017;#d4a017;#c87b2a;#c87b2a;#c44;#c44;#e05252;#e05252;#2d8a4e" keyTimes="0;0.14;0.167;0.31;0.333;0.48;0.5;0.64;0.667;0.81;0.833;0.97;1" dur="15s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                <animate attributeName="r" values="5;18;5" dur="1.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.7;0;0.7" dur="1.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
              </circle>
              <!-- Active solid dot -->
              <circle r="4" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5">
                <animate attributeName="cx" values="158;158;152;152;236;236;72;72;211;211;167;167;158" keyTimes="0;0.14;0.167;0.31;0.333;0.48;0.5;0.64;0.667;0.81;0.833;0.97;1" dur="15s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                <animate attributeName="cy" values="23;23;34;34;74;74;40;40;59;59;32;32;23" keyTimes="0;0.14;0.167;0.31;0.333;0.48;0.5;0.64;0.667;0.81;0.833;0.97;1" dur="15s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                <animate attributeName="fill" values="#2d8a4e;#2d8a4e;#3d9e5a;#3d9e5a;#d4a017;#d4a017;#c87b2a;#c87b2a;#c44;#c44;#e05252;#e05252;#2d8a4e" keyTimes="0;0.14;0.167;0.31;0.333;0.48;0.5;0.64;0.667;0.81;0.833;0.97;1" dur="15s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
              </circle>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <!-- Region tag — 6-way cycle -->
          <div class="lab-six-stack" style="min-height:1.3rem; display:flex; justify-content:center;">
            <span class="lab-rtag lab-rtag-n lab-r1"><span class="lab-rdot"></span> Norway &mdash; Hydro</span>
            <span class="lab-rtag lab-rtag-n lab-r2"><span class="lab-rdot"></span> France &mdash; Nuclear</span>
            <span class="lab-rtag lab-rtag-u lab-r3"><span class="lab-rdot"></span> Singapore &mdash; Gas</span>
            <span class="lab-rtag lab-rtag-u lab-r4"><span class="lab-rdot"></span> US Average &mdash; Mixed</span>
            <span class="lab-rtag lab-rtag-p lab-r5"><span class="lab-rdot"></span> India &mdash; Coal</span>
            <span class="lab-rtag lab-rtag-p lab-r6"><span class="lab-rdot"></span> Poland &mdash; Coal</span>
          </div>
          <div class="lab-sustain-panel">
            <div class="lab-sustain-top">
              <!-- Donut — 6-phase morph via SVG animate -->
              <div class="lab-sustain-donut">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64">
                  <circle class="lab-donut-bg" cx="32" cy="32" r="24"/>
                  <circle class="lab-donut-fill" cx="32" cy="32" r="24" style="stroke-dasharray:150.8">
                    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="3;3;15;15;96;96;90.5;90.5;121;121;128;128;3" keyTimes="0;0.14;0.167;0.31;0.333;0.48;0.5;0.64;0.667;0.81;0.833;0.97;1" dur="15s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                    <animate attributeName="stroke" values="#3d9e5a;#3d9e5a;#3d9e5a;#3d9e5a;#c87b2a;#c87b2a;#c87b2a;#c87b2a;#e05252;#e05252;#e05252;#e05252;#3d9e5a" keyTimes="0;0.14;0.167;0.31;0.333;0.48;0.5;0.64;0.667;0.81;0.833;0.97;1" dur="15s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                  </circle>
                </svg>
                <div class="lab-donut-center">
                  <div class="lab-six-stack" style="min-height:0.9rem">
                    <span class="lab-donut-pct lab-r1" style="color:#3d9e5a">98%</span>
                    <span class="lab-donut-pct lab-r2" style="color:#3d9e5a">90%</span>
                    <span class="lab-donut-pct lab-r3" style="color:#c87b2a">36%</span>
                    <span class="lab-donut-pct lab-r4" style="color:#c87b2a">40%</span>
                    <span class="lab-donut-pct lab-r5" style="color:#e05252">20%</span>
                    <span class="lab-donut-pct lab-r6" style="color:#e05252">15%</span>
                  </div>
                  <div class="lab-donut-label">renewable</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <!-- Metrics — 6-way swap -->
              <div class="lab-sustain-metrics">
                <div class="lab-smetric"><span class="lab-smetric-label">CO&#x2082;</span><span class="lab-smetric-val lab-six-swap"><span class="lab-r1" style="color:#3d9e5a">1.2 t</span><span class="lab-r2" style="color:#3d9e5a">3.0 t</span><span class="lab-r3" style="color:#c87b2a">24 t</span><span class="lab-r4" style="color:#c87b2a">26 t</span><span class="lab-r5" style="color:#e05252">42 t</span><span class="lab-r6" style="color:#e05252">52 t</span></span></div>
                <div class="lab-smetric"><span class="lab-smetric-label">Water</span><span class="lab-smetric-val lab-six-swap"><span class="lab-r1" style="color:#3d9e5a">0 ML</span><span class="lab-r2" style="color:#3d9e5a">0.8 ML</span><span class="lab-r3" style="color:#c87b2a">2.4 ML</span><span class="lab-r4" style="color:#c87b2a">3.8 ML</span><span class="lab-r5" style="color:#e05252">4.2 ML</span><span class="lab-r6" style="color:#e05252">5.1 ML</span></span></div>
                <div class="lab-smetric"><span class="lab-smetric-label">PUE</span><span class="lab-smetric-val lab-six-swap"><span class="lab-r1" style="color:#3d9e5a">1.06</span><span class="lab-r2" style="color:#3d9e5a">1.10</span><span class="lab-r3" style="color:#c87b2a">1.20</span><span class="lab-r4" style="color:#c87b2a">1.12</span><span class="lab-r5" style="color:#e05252">1.40</span><span class="lab-r6" style="color:#e05252">1.58</span></span></div>
                <div class="lab-smetric"><span class="lab-smetric-label">gCO&#x2082;/kWh</span><span class="lab-smetric-val lab-six-swap"><span class="lab-r1" style="color:#3d9e5a">10</span><span class="lab-r2" style="color:#3d9e5a">50</span><span class="lab-r3" style="color:#c87b2a">400</span><span class="lab-r4" style="color:#c87b2a">429</span><span class="lab-r5" style="color:#e05252">700</span><span class="lab-r6" style="color:#e05252">820</span></span></div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Comparison strip — 6 regions always visible -->
            <div class="lab-cstrip">
              <div class="lab-cstrip-item lab-chi-1"><div class="lab-cstrip-name lab-cstrip-n">NO</div><div class="lab-cstrip-val lab-cstrip-n">1.2</div></div>
              <div class="lab-cstrip-item lab-chi-2"><div class="lab-cstrip-name lab-cstrip-n">FR</div><div class="lab-cstrip-val lab-cstrip-n">3.0</div></div>
              <div class="lab-cstrip-item lab-chi-3"><div class="lab-cstrip-name lab-cstrip-u">SG</div><div class="lab-cstrip-val lab-cstrip-u">24</div></div>
              <div class="lab-cstrip-item lab-chi-4"><div class="lab-cstrip-name lab-cstrip-u">US</div><div class="lab-cstrip-val lab-cstrip-u">26</div></div>
              <div class="lab-cstrip-item lab-chi-5"><div class="lab-cstrip-name lab-cstrip-p">IN</div><div class="lab-cstrip-val lab-cstrip-p">42</div></div>
              <div class="lab-cstrip-item lab-chi-6"><div class="lab-cstrip-name lab-cstrip-p">PL</div><div class="lab-cstrip-val lab-cstrip-p">52</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="lab-insight"><span class="lab-insight-icon">&#9889;</span><span>Location is a 43&times; carbon multiplier for the same compute</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="lab-footer"><span><span class="lab-status-dot"></span>Marimo</span><span>Explore mode</span></div>
      </div>
      <p class="mls-feature-desc">Predict, explore, and discover why your intuition was wrong.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</section>

<!-- Section 5: Hardware Kits (DEPLOY) -->
<section class="mls-section">
<div class="mls-landing-grid">
  <div class="mls-landing-left">
    <p class="mls-hero-eyebrow">HARDWARE KITS</p>
    <h1 class="mls-hero-title">Deploy to<br/>the edge.</h1>
    <p class="mls-hero-tagline">Real silicon.<br/>Real constraints.</p>
    <p class="mls-hero-intro">Take your models out of the cloud and into the physical world. Hands-on deployment labs using Arduino, Raspberry Pi, and Seeed Studio hardware.</p>

    <div class="mls-meta">
      <p class="mls-links"><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/kits/">Explore Kits &rarr;</a></p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="mls-landing-right">
    <div class="mls-feature-card">
      <img src="assets/nicla-vision-front.jpeg" alt="Nicla Vision" class="mls-feature-image" style="max-width: 200px; margin-bottom: 2rem;" />
      <p class="mls-feature-desc">Microcontrollers, single-board computers, and specialized accelerators.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<footer class="mls-footer" style="margin-top: 6rem;">
  <span>Vijay Janapa Reddi, Harvard University · MIT Press 2026</span>
</footer>
</section>

</div>

<script src="neural-bg.js"></script>
```

:::
